title: California Lawmakers Urge Trump to Spare Stateâ€™s Hydrogen Energy Project
content: A bipartisan group of California lawmakers is calling on the Trump administration to preserve $1.2 billion in federal funds for a hydrogen energy project to help wean the state off planet-warming fossil fuels. The potential cuts come as the Trump administration continues to target environmental programs in California and across the country in what officials say is an effort to ease regulatory costs and lower taxes.
author: Analysts Account
